label: Unwanted AI feature prominence
summary: Users are frustrated by the aggressive integration and constant promotion of AI features throughout the app, which they feel has compromised the clean interface and user experience they originally valued.

label: Enthusiastic praise for Notion's versatility and organization
summary: Users express strong satisfaction with the app's customization, AI features, cross-platform sync, and overall productivity benefits, though a few note missing handwriting support or poor mobile recording.

label: App crashes on launch after update
summary: Users report the app fails to open or crashes immediately after launching, particularly following recent updates, leaving them unable to access their work.

label: Missing Apple Pencil drawing/inking support
summary: Users love the app overall but strongly want native drawing and handwriting features for Apple Pencil, with some also reporting poor Pencil interaction behavior in the current implementation.

label: App freezes and requires constant force-close
summary: Users report persistent performance issues where the mobile app frequently freezes, lags, becomes unresponsive, and requires force-closing to continue working, significantly impacting usability despite appreciating the app's functionality.

label: Login/logout causes data loss
summary: Users report that after being logged out (often unexpectedly or after an update), logging back in results in all their notes, pages, and workspaces permanently disappearing, with data not found in trash or recoverable by support.

label: Mobile app hard to navigate
summary: Users find the mobile app confusing and difficult to use compared to the desktop version, with poor mobile UI adaptation and unintuitive navigation making features hard to access despite liking the core product.

label: Text input fails with cursor/viewport jumps
summary: Users report the mobile app frequently prevents typing, misplaces the cursor, causes unwanted scrolling/viewport jumps, and requires app restarts to regain text input functionality.

label: Subscription billing and support issues
summary: Users report problems with subscription billing, payment not being recognized after purchase, difficulty canceling, and poor or unresponsive customer support when trying to resolve these issues.

label: Missing offline access
summary: Users are frustrated that Notion lacks offline mode, preventing them from accessing or editing their content without an internet connection, which they consider a critical missing feature despite years of requests.

label: Template search crashes on iPad
summary: Users report that template search and selection consistently breaks or crashes on iPad, preventing them from viewing, opening, or editing templates due to UI glitches and keyboard interference.

label: Login loop logs users out repeatedly
summary: Users are experiencing persistent login failures where the app logs them out repeatedly, password reset doesn't work, sign-in links loop back to the sign-in page, and they lose access to their data and paid subscriptions.

label: Keyboard input breaks on iPad
summary: Users report widespread keyboard issues on iPad including typing lag, keyboard disconnection after a few characters, copy/paste failures, and screen jumping during input, making the app unusable with both Smart Keyboards and Magic Keyboards despite working well on other platforms.

label: Calendar sync and mobile UX issues
summary: Users struggle with calendar syncing across platforms, find the mobile calendar view inadequate compared to desktop, and report various calendar-related usability problems alongside steep learning curves for new users.

label: App crashes with large notes
summary: Users report the app crashes, freezes, or becomes unresponsive when opening or editing notes with large amounts of content, requiring frequent force-quits and relaunches.

label: Mobile app buggy and hard to use
summary: Users love Notion on desktop but find the mobile app buggy, slow, has poor touch/tablet support, text is too small, and lacks feature parity with desktop versions.

label: App crashes and auto-refreshes on iOS/iPad
summary: Users report the iOS/iPad app constantly crashes, freezes, or auto-refreshes every few seconds, making it unusable despite loving the desktop version.

label: No adjustable font size on mobile
summary: Users love the app overall but repeatedly request the ability to adjust or increase font size on mobile devices, particularly for accessibility and readability on smaller screens.

label: iPad lacks columns and desktop features
summary: Users want columns, drag-and-drop, widgets, and other desktop features to work properly on iPad, as the mobile experience is severely limited compared to desktop.

label: iPad app poor optimization and bugs
summary: Users love Notion overall but find the iPad version frustrating due to multiple issues including cursor disappearing, poor Apple Pencil support, missing features like multi-tab support, limited touch navigation, and lack of optimization compared to desktop/Mac versions.

label: App stuck on loading screen
summary: Users report the app becomes stuck on a perpetual loading screen after recent updates, preventing them from accessing any content despite reinstalling or restarting their devices.

label: Mixed/unclear feedback
summary: Users praise the app's functionality while requesting Russian language support, Apple Pencil scribble features, and reporting performance issues with longer notes causing crashes and freezing.
